title: syntherisma mollis
intro: Syntherisma mollis, commonly known as the soft syntherisma or soft syntherisma plant, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering various health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. The therapeutic actions of Syntherisma mollis include its ability to modulate the immune system, exhibit antioxidant properties, and potentially reduce fever. The bioactive constituents of Syntherisma mollis include flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
